title: Preparing for HTB CDSA 7-Day Practical Exam
description: Preparing for the Hack The Box Certified Defensive Security Analyst (HTB CDSA) 7-day practical exam to strengthen my expertise in defensive security and incident response.

title: Solved and Documented "Telly" Lab by Hack The Box
description: Successfully Solved and Documented "Telly" Lab by Hack The Box, which involved analyzing network PCAP artifacts to investigate a backup server compromise.

title: Successfully Passed HTB CPTS 10-Day Practical Exam
description: Successfully passed the Hack The Box Certified Penetration Testing Specialist (HTB CPTS) 10-day practical exam, demonstrating practical proficiency in penetration testing and reporting.
